title: Genotype-Phenotype Integration through Machine Learning and Personalized Gene Regulatory Networks for Cancer Metastasis Prediction
focus: Cancer metastasis prediction using machine learning and personalized gene regulatory networks
research_gaps_addressed: Most existing ML models predict metastasis status only for a single cancer type
Few studies have systematically assessed methods for pancancer metastases
Few studies have evaluated applicability in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs)
GNN-based studies typically use static networks shared by all samples
